## Verdict:
verdict: unclear
confidence: 0.55
evidence:
  - file: "requirements.txt"
    line: 1
    snippet: "easydel @ git+https://github.com/dvruette/EasyDeL.git@c78c2431ef4beac5072b526e61552c4322a9ce2e"
  - file: "requirements.txt"
    line: 8
    snippet: "jax==0.7.1"
  - file: "requirements.txt"
    line: 3
    snippet: "orbax==0.1.9"
notes: "Stack is JAX/EasyDeL/Orbax — JAX itself supports CPU/GPU/TPU so single-device inference is technically feasible, but EasyDeL is a distributed-training framework and no explicit CPU/single-GPU inference entrypoint was surfaced in this quick check; confirming feasibility would require inspecting the actual model/inference scripts for hardcoded mesh/sharding assumptions.
